subject: A prismatic star-burst energy crystal radiating multi-colored light against a dark stormy background — a Double Rainbow Energy Special Energy card
description: The art depicts a large luminous geometric energy formation resembling a faceted crystal or snowflake, radiating prismatic light in all directions. The colors span the full spectrum — reds, oranges, yellows, greens, blues, and purples — emanating outward from a bright central core. The background is dark and atmospheric, suggesting charged or stormy conditions. No Pokemon or characters are present; the image is purely elemental and abstract, conveying the card's mechanical identity as a universal energy source at the cost of a damage counter.
